series_metadata.series_title: Report of Remittances to State Treasurer
series_metadata.series_description: Used by institutions to report cafeteria, housing, and other miscellaneous income to Central Office for consolidation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released. ; Electronic: Retain one year after audit by Auditor of State and after audit report is released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
